title: Reimagined
body:
### Want early access to new updates, behind the scenes content or some extra goodies while supporting me and Reimagined's development? Consider donating to my [Patreon!](https://www.patreon.com/cw/Reijvi) <3

![Logo](https://gyazo.com/b1a381494dca16aaaab3e5a8ae288edd.png)
### Reimagined, a love letter to Minecraft

Reimagined is a constant work in progress which is an extensive overhaul changing as much as possible in big and subtle ways. From hundreds of new block variants, completely new remade guis, new sounds, animations, biome colors, mobs, particles and so on! Reimagined should hopefully have a bit of everything people can enjoy.

It'll hopefully will give your pixel world a bit more of an immersive feel, while keeping that cozy familiar Minecraft charm.

![image](https://gyazo.com/bc7de590d68cd890727edc11f353c58b.png)
![image](https://i.gyazo.com/14e4ffe26741511cf22d3b7558a49749.png)

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

### TO GET ALL OF THE REIMAGINED FEATURES, PLEASE USE THESE MODS:
<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

Required mods for the full Reimagined experience, Pack may or may not break if missing any of these:

[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 
Needed for custom Mob models

[POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) 
Used for a better colormap, better sodium parity and so on (Villager GUI for pre-1.21.6 versions)

[CONTINUITY](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
Used for Connected Textures, like plank borders, carpet ctm, grass overlays, etc

[RESPACKOPTS 1.21+](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)
Used to further customise Reimagined with in-game settings. This one is needed currently for improved grass or bushy leaves since it's enabled via a setting.
If you want Grassy Grass without Respackopts, be sure to use the [Grassy Grass Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grassy-grass)

[MODEFITE PRE-1.21.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport)
Needed to backport features from newer versions, this includes stuff like 3D buckets or items when held in hand. This one isn't needed if you're on 1.21.4+


![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

Recommended mods for a smoother, more optimised Reimagined experience:

[SODIUM](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

</details>



![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

<details>
<summary>Show Addons</summary>

Official Addons:

[Fresh Animations Compatibility Patch](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/reimagined-fresh-animations-patch)

![Line](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1011243706063527961/1069384365785743534/line2.png)

Unofficial Addons:

[Healthbars (Spryzeen's Health bars compatibility addon)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/spryzeens-health-bars/files/4072909)

[Emissive Ores](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/emissive-ores-fore-mc-reimagined-by-reijvi/)

[Darkmode GUI](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-reimagined-dark-mode-gui/)

</details>

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

It is recommended to play on the US English language, since I've renamed and modified a few text colors and names, some of which affect the gui!

![Line](https://i.gyazo.com/f3f4039af982436919e3496a63f7c9e6.png)

<details>
<summary>CREDITS</summary>

-un_roman [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/un_roman/) for being super kind and creating the Reimagined text logo!

-RickyMemester [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/rickymemester/) for letting me borrow a few of his original ore texture variants which I've previously used in my older "Randomize It" and modified quite a bit.

-DartCat25 [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/dartcat25/) for letting me borrow his "Menus - Enchanted", as well as his "Rotating Items" shader for some of Reimagined's features to work.

-Godlander [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/godlander/) for letting me borrow his "Animated Skin" shader for some of Reimagined's features to work.

-Cosmoman, [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/cosmoman_476/) has helped and contributated with loads of textures, porting deepslate ores, consistency changes and so on.

-ShrimpSnail, [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/shrimpsnail/) let me borrow and repurpose their enchanting book cem animation from their The Great Shrimpsby pack.

-EwanHowell, [(PMC)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ewanhowell5195/) has helped me with honestly more than I can count, biggest reason I even know how to make resource packs

-Complementary Reimagined for being the go to screenshot shader (ironic I know)

</details>
